content:
# Prinos Basin

**Summary**: A sedimentary basin in the North Aegean Sea, Greece.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-alzayer|Alzayer, 2023]] focused on the Epsilon oil field located within the Prinos Basin.

- [[2023-gad|Gad, 2023]] focused on the Prinos basin for data collection and model testing.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2023-alzayer|Alzayer, 2023]] Dome-like anticline formed by NW-striking and SW-dipping syngenetic faults.

- [[2023-gad|Gad, 2023]] focused on the Prinos basin for data collection and model testing.

## Formations Present



## Key Findings From This Location

- The Prinos Basin is the only productive hydrocarbon area in Greece. ([[2023-alzayer|Alzayer, 2023, p. 14]])

- The Prinos basin is the only geological area in Greece that produces hydrocarbons. ([[2023-gad|Gad, 2023, p. 28]])
